signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% (or 2.16%), up from 2.0% in February | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but marking an increase after two months steady at 2%[2][3]. This is the latest confirmed data as of early April 2026, with sources reporting 2.2% (Trading
